chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2683 - وَ سَأَلَهُ سَعِيدٌ اَلْأَعْرَجُ : عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يَسْتَتِرُ مِنَ اَلشَّمْسِ بِعُودِ أَوْ بِيَدِهِ فَقَالَ «لاَ إِلاَّ مِنْ عِلَّةٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2683 - Saeed al-A'raj asked him about a person in the state of ihram seeking shade from the sun using a stick or their hand.
Imam (as) said: "No, except in the case of an illness."
